mapper.sql: id, order_number, user_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM orders WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT orders_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO orders (id, order_number, user_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_number = #{orderNumber}, user_id = #{userId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
